SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class VisitsReportDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class VisitsReportDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Result of the Visits-by-Type report: per-category visit counts and average stay lengths over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park.

The fromDate/toDate/parkId fields echo the filter the report was run with so the client can label the output without re-deriving it; parkId is null when the report spans the whole region (all parks). rows always carries both categories — "INDIVIDUALS" and "GROUPS" — even when one had no visits in the window (zero-filled).

Built server-side by ReportDAO.visitsByType(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.Integer) in response to RequestType.REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE; immutable and Serializable.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • VisitsReportDTO

      public VisitsReportDTO(String fromDate, String toDate, Integer parkId, List<VisitsReportRow> rows)
      Creates a fully populated visits report.
      Parameters:
      fromDate - inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      toDate - inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      parkId - park filter, or null for the whole region
      rows - the per-category rows (both categories, zero-filled as needed)

  • Method Details

    • getFromDate

      public String getFromDate()
      Returns:
      the inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd

    • getToDate

      public String getToDate()
      Returns:
      the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd

    • getParkId

      public Integer getParkId()
      Returns:
      the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks)

    • getRows

      public List<VisitsReportRow> getRows()
      Returns:
      the per-category rows (both "INDIVIDUALS" and "GROUPS")
